methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the correlations between airborne pollen, allergen concentrations, and environmental variables using nonparametric Spearman correlation and multiple regression analyses.

steps.description: Nonparametric Spearman correlation analysis was performed to evaluate statistical correlations between airborne pollen and allergen concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Spearman correlation analysis between pollen and allergen concentrations

steps.description: Multiple regression analyses were applied based on stepwise variable selection in the statistical software R (version 4.0.3).
steps.searchable_summary: apply multiple regression analysis with stepwise variable selection in R

steps.description: Response variables were log-transformed to adjust for the normality of residuals.
steps.searchable_summary: log-transform response variables for normality adjustment

steps.description: Autoregressive-moving average (ARMA) correlation structure was selected for the models using the function gls from the nlme package.
steps.searchable_summary: apply ARMA correlation structure using gls function from nlme package

steps.description: Regression models containing all considered explanatory variables were fitted and insignificant variables (p-value > 0.05) were sequentially removed from the model.
steps.searchable_summary: fit regression models and remove insignificant variables

methods.method_name: Airborne Pollen and Allergen Sampling and Quantifying
methods.description: Procedures for collecting and quantifying airborne pollen and allergen concentrations using specialized equipment.

steps.description: Hirst-type volumetric pollen trap was used to evaluate grass pollen concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: use Hirst-type pollen trap to collect grass pollen data

steps.description: Multi-vial Volumetric Cyclone Air Sampler was used to evaluate Phl p 5 allergen concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: use Multi-vial Cyclone Sampler to collect allergen data

steps.description: Exposed tape from the Hirst sampler was cut into segments for microscopic slide preparation.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare microscopic slides from Hirst sampler tape

steps.description: Slides were analyzed under the light microscope at ×400 magnification.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze slides under light microscope at ×400 magnification

steps.description: Airborne samples were collected dry and stored at −20°C until extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: store airborne samples at −20°C for later extraction

steps.description: Airborne Phl p 5 allergen was enumerated by double-sandwich ELISA assay.
steps.searchable_summary: enumerate Phl p 5 allergen using ELISA assay

steps.description: Daily values of grass pollen potency were calculated by dividing daily allergen concentrations by daily pollen concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate grass pollen potency from allergen and pollen concentrations

methods.description: Collection of meteorological and air pollution data to analyze their impact on airborne pollen and allergen levels.

steps.description: Meteorological data were provided from the Meteorological Observatory of the Comenius University in Bratislava.
steps.searchable_summary: collect meteorological data from Comenius University Observatory

steps.description: Air pollution data were provided by the Slovak Hydrometeorological Institute.
steps.searchable_summary: collect air pollution data from Slovak Hydrometeorological Institute
